name: @km/seed-cli-mcp
description: stdio MCP server wrapping seed-cli for the Knowledge Manager agent.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target node --outdir dist --minify && bun build src/poll-cli.ts --target node --outdir dist --minify --outfile poll-cli.js && bun build src/cadence-cli.ts --target node --outdir dist --minify --outfile cadence-cli.js && bun build src/telegram-bot.ts --target node --outdir dist --minify --outfile telegram-bot.js
